For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 25.02.2026 M/s. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Faiz Muhammad Larik, Tufail Ahmed Kumbhar, Abdul Sami Soomro, Abdul Rehman Bhutto, Mansoor Ali Panhwar, Zuhaib Azam Rajput, Nisar Ahmed Abro, Ayaz Hussain Kalhoro, Javed Ahmed Soomro, Riaz Hussain Khoso, Abdul Qudoos Jatoi, Mujahid Ali Jatoi, Muhammad Afzal Jagirani & Ali Raza Patha, Advocates for the Petitioners.

Habibullah G. Ghouri, Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Faiz Muhammad Larik, Tufail Ahmed Kumbhar, Abdul Sami Soomro, Abdul Rehman Bhutto, Mansoor Ali Panhwar, Zuhaib Azam Rajput, Nisar Ahmed Abro, Ayaz Hussain Kalhoro, Javed Ahmed Soomro, Riaz Hussain Khoso, Abdul Qudoos Jatoi, Mujahid Ali Jatoi, Muhammad Afzal Jagirani & Ali Raza Patha, Advocates for the Petitioners. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along with Saeed Ahmed Jatoi, Deputy Director, DEPD Government of Sindh, Shoukat Ali Abro, DHO, Larkana, Siraj Ahmed Soomro, Office Superintendent, DC Office, Larkana & Safdar Ali Kalwar, Mukhtiarkar Kashomore. -x-x-x-x-x- Some of the Petitioners have not filed amended title to array the Sindh Persons with Disabilities Protection Authority [SPDPA] as party to the petition. If compliance is not made within a week, the office shall list 2 those petitions separately for non-prosecution. Where amended title has been so filed, issue notice to the SPDPA through its Director General. Pursuant to order dated 10.02.2026, the Additional Advocate General Sindh files a common compliance report in C.P No. D-501/2025 and connected petitions. He shall file a copy of the same in all connected petition. The compliance report is on behalf of the Chief Secretary Sindh. The report states that the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities [DEPD] has engaged the expertise of the IBA-Sukkur for developing the ‘Employment Exchange Portal’ envisaged in section 11 of the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Jatoi, Deputy Director DEPD, informs that the IBA-Sukkur has been given time up till August 2026 to complete the project. Given the urgency involved in these matters, that timeline is too long. The Deputy Director DEPD shall make efforts to reduce that timeline. The ‘Director, Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities [DEPD], Government of Sindh’, is added as a Respondent to these petitions. The compliance report on behalf of the Chief Secretary further informs that the Sindh Persons with Disabilities Protection Authority [SPDPA] had been notified as far back as 05.10.2020.

The ‘Director, Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities [DEPD], Government of Sindh’, is added as a Respondent to these petitions. The compliance report on behalf of the Chief Secretary further informs that the Sindh Persons with Disabilities Protection Authority [SPDPA] had been notified as far back as 05.10.2020. Yet, the perception is that the SPDPA does not exist. Issue e-notice for the personal appearance of the Director General, SPDPA namely Mr. Ghulam Farooque Leghari, to apprise the Court of steps taken to implement the provisions of the Act of 2018, in particular for the placement of Grievance Redressal Officers envisaged in section 11 of the Act. Mr. Deputy Director DEPD may also assist in that regard. To come up on 11.03.2026 at 11:00 A.M. Office to place a copy of this order in all above-mentioned petitions. JUDGE JUDGE Zulfiqar
